channel.title: Alexander Gherschon's Internet Corner
channel.description: Alexander Gherschon's internet corner. You'll find here blog posts, (open-source) projects info and general programmer whinings.

item.title: New blog!
item.description:
Yup, here goes another blog. I alawys want to write posts about what I’m currently working on but ends up maintaing an heavy wordress instead.

This time I took another approach with a zero effort-to-maintain site/blog: Jekyll and Github Pages. Let’s see how that goes in the next weeks!

Cheers, Alex.
